input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.11.2.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.11.2.2
            TITLE: appropriate insulated tools must be used when working on the accumulator or tractive

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.11.2.2: Appropriate insulated tools must be used when working on the Accumulator or Tractive
EV.11.2.2 Appropriate insulated tools must be used when working on the Accumulator or Tractive 
System

final_answer: Appropriate insulated tools must be used when working on the Accumulator or Tractive System
